memoryText: Malia (4) and her Mama spent a whole summer day at the beach. They hunted for seashells like pirates looking for treasure, built a sandcastle with a moat, ate dripping ice cream cones, and a cheeky wave soaked Mama's dress which made Malia laugh until her tummy hurt. They stayed until the sun painted the water orange.

people.name: Malia
people.appearance: a 4-year-old girl with curly dark brown hair in two puffs, big brown eyes, rosy cheeks, wearing a yellow sundress with white polka dots and red sandals

people.name: Mama
people.appearance: a warm woman in her mid-30s with long wavy dark hair, brown skin, gold hoop earrings, wearing a flowing coral-red summer dress and a straw hat

greeting: For Malia — may every wave bring you a new treasure. Love, Mama.
